title: Kit manifest (kit/v1)
description: A named, semver-versioned, distributable bundle of stories: kit.yaml. See docs/proposals/kits.md.

namespace.description: Publisher/org namespace, e.g. constructorfabric. Full identity is @<namespace>/<kit>.

requires.description: Host engine version constraint(s) this kit needs.

kitsoki.description: Semver constraint on the kitsoki engine, e.g. ">=0.1.0".

extends.description: Kits this kit specializes (single-parent-per-entry contract extension).

composes.description: Kits this kit folds together (multi-kit composition, no shared contract implied).

parameters.description: The kit's specialization surface — named parameters an implementation binds (epic lean 6: profiles become named presets).

stories.description: Standalone-runnable story names this kit provides, each resolvable under stories/<name>/app.yaml relative to the kit root.

schemas.description: Data-management artifact schema ids this kit registers, e.g. nonconformity/v1.

interfaces.description: Named host_interfaces (capability contracts) this kit's stories declare or depend on.

ui.description: Kit-contributed UI module entry points. Either a bare entry-path string (S3c's original shape) or {id, title, entry, nav} (S5/D3's full shape, needed for a nav link).

onboarding.description: Entry intent for install/setup, e.g. qms.onboard.

story_dirs.description: Overrides the default `stories/<name>` resolution for one or more provides.stories entries, keyed by story name, value a kit-root-relative directory (e.g. "." for a kit.yaml that sits directly beside its story's own app.yaml). S6 root-generalization escape hatch (docs/proposals/kits.md).

root.description: Declares one of this kit's provides.stories as a valid 'blessed root' a synthesized instance may import (D6, S6) -- manifest-driven replacement for the old hardcoded RootStoryName const + duplicated five-interface allow-list.

story.description: Which provides.stories entry is enterable as root.

entry.description: The root story's initial state when synthesized as the implicit root.

host_interfaces.description: Allow-list of host_interfaces names an `overrides.bindings.<iface>` may rebind.

hosts.description: Fixed host allow-list the synthesized root declares (hosts: declared) for this root story's subtree.

conformance.description: The kit's no-LLM contract suite, re-run against downstream extensions (S4).

flows.description: Glob patterns for flow/cassette fixtures under the kit root.

compat.description: Migration hints an absorber applies mechanically when this kit revs (S7).

renamed.description: Rename hints grouped by category (exits, intents, world, ...).
